### 0. [rule] Route groups for organization
Use (groupName) folders to organize routes without affecting URLs. Group by concern: (marketing), (dashboard), (auth). Each group can have its own layout.
_Tags: route-groups, structure, nextjs_


### 1. [rule] Route groups for organization
Use (groupName) folders to organize routes without affecting URLs. Group by concern: (marketing), (dashboard), (auth). Each group can have its own layout.

### 2. [rule] Route groups for organization
Use (groupName) folders to organize routes without affecting URLs. Group by concern: (marketing), (dashboard), (auth). Each group can have its own layout.
_Tags: route-groups, structure, nextjs_


### 3. [rule] Domain has no dependencies
Domain entities and value objects must not import any framework, ORM, or library. Pure TypeScript/language only.
_Tags: domain, clean-architecture_


### 4. [rule] Core has zero framework imports
The core (domain + application) must not import Express, NestJS, Prisma, or any framework. Pure domain logic only.
_Tags: core, framework-free, hexagonal_


### 5. [decision] Route groups for organization
Use route groups (folder) to organize routes without affecting URLs. Group by feature or access level (auth), (public).
_Tags: route-groups, structure, nextjs_


### 6. [rule] No ORM in use cases
Use cases must not import Prisma, TypeORM, or any ORM entity. Call repository interfaces only.
_Tags: use-case, orm, clean-architecture_


### 7. [rule] Core is framework-free
The application core (domain + use cases) must not import Express, NestJS, Fastify, Prisma, TypeORM, or any framework library. Pure language code only.
_Tags: core, framework-free, hexagonal_
